mapper.insert: INSERT INTO winner_deal ( auction_id, winner_id, seller_id, winner_price, status, delivery_status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{auctionId}, #{winnerId}, #{sellerId}, #{winnerPrice}, #{status}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, auction_id AS auctionId, winner_id AS winnerId, seller_id AS sellerId, winner_price AS winnerPrice, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM winner_deal WHERE auction_id = #{auctionId} LIMIT 1
